title: draba ucuncha
intro: Draba ucuncha is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as mustard or cabbage family. It has been traditionally used in the Andean region for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help in treating various health issues. The plant is valued for its ability to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues like diarrhea and ulcers. Herbal preparations of Draba ucuncha include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be taken orally or applied topically to the affected area.
